case_title: CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS. TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-13-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $147.75 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: VALUED OF 800.00 , 2 CANON NP6221 COPIERS VALUED AT $400.00 EACH SERIAL NO. NGV20797, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,802.38 DAMAGES, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $147.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,375.13, AND NGV19829. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-17-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-20-2002
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. SERVED APR-10-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIS PROPERTY ACQUISITION COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
